name: ux-sustainable-product

Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Source Sustainable Web Design — Tom Greenwood  ## Objective Use quando o pedido envolver: web performance, sustainable web, bundle size, core web vitals, green ux, performance budget.
---

# UX Sustainable Product

## Stack alvo
- Next.js 15+ App Router
- React 19+
- TanStack Query
- shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4
- Monorepo (apps + packages)

## Workflow
1. Define performance budget by jornada (weight, TTI, critical requests).
2. Auditar assets (imagens, fontes, bibliotecas) by oportunidade of reducao.
3. Escolher strategy of render (SSR/SSG/CSR) by necessidade real.
4. Verificar progressive enhancement in condicoes adversas of rede.
5. Monitorar Core Web Vitals como KPI of product in producao.

## Saída esperada
1. Diagnostico of custo by tela/rota.
2. Plano of reducao of peso e scripts.
3. Priorizacao by impacto in UX e performance.
4. Guardrails for PRs of frontend (asset, bundle, render).
